mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY ad_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'

SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND approval_status = #{approvalStatus}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE ad_id = #{adId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_advertisements.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO advertisements ( ad_id, title, content, image_url, landing_url, ad_type, position, target_age_min, target_age_max, target_gender, device_type, ad_channel, start_datetime, end_datetime, advertiser_id, total_budget ) VALUES ( #{adId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{landingUrl}, #{adType}, #{position}, #{targetAgeMin}, #{targetAgeMax}, #{targetGender}, #{deviceType}, #{adChannel}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{advertiserId}, #{totalBudget} )
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisements SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, landing_url = #{landingUrl}, ad_type = #{adType}, position = #{position}, target_age_min = #{targetAgeMin}, target_age_max = #{targetAgeMax}, target_gender = #{targetGender}, device_type = #{deviceType}, ad_channel = #{adChannel}, start_datetime = #{startDatetime}, end_datetime = #{endDatetime}, total_budget = #{totalBudget}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId} AND advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
UPDATE advertisements SET delete_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

UPDATE advertisements SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
UPDATE advertisements SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND status = 'OPEN' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN start_datetime AND end_datetime ORDER BY priority_score DESC, DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND status = 'CLOSED'
